description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND a game is on the schedule with broadcasters
AND the `mediaState` for the feeds is set to `MEDIA_ARCHIVE`

steps.action: WHEN the user selects a game tile for an archive game
steps.result:
THEN the Feed Modal displays
AND the following statement is spoken, "<away_team> @ <home_team>, <button_name/feed_name>, <feed_type>, press select to play, press <appropriate_directions> for more content. Press back to dismiss."
